title: buxus gonoclada
intro: Buxus gonoclada, also known as boxwood, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing, due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Buxus gonoclada are often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
